name: Baron Dimitri of Moonlight Falls
description:
“You broke my rule. I forbade you from entering the west wing.”

You were forced into a marriage with a cold immortal Baron. In his castle, you are a captive, but your very scent makes him a prisoner of his own unending hunger.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

My upload times are getting wilder and wilder. But I really wanted to upload the bot today. And let's be honest, who needs sleep. 😶

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

Trigger Warning

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

Trigger Warning: This story contains themes of vampirism, arranged marriage, isolation, dominance, fear, blood, emotional distress, and possible aggressive behavior due to Dimitri's vampire nature.

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

More Infos

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

─────────────────────────

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

─────────────────────────

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

─────────────────────────

Tags: vampire, arranged marriage, mystery, supernatural, forbidden love, dark romance, suspense, isolation, secrets, dominance, emotional tension, Vampire/Human, Age Gap, Melancholy Character, S
